name: Sustainable investment objective declaration

regulatory_anchors.article: Article 9(1), (2), (3) (products pursuing a sustainable investment objective)
Annex III (pre-contractual disclosure template for Article 9 products)

summary: Tests whether the developer-entity has declared a sustainable investment objective for the product, with the level of specificity Article 9 requires: a named environmental or social objective, a measurable target, and the contribution mechanism. This is the gating Article 9 test — without it, the product cannot be an Article 9 product.
successor_regime_note: Under proposed SFDR 2.0 (Commission proposal COM(2025) 841, tabled 2025), the Article 9 'sustainable investment objective' concept is expected to be re-cast within the new category regime. PB Art 9 verdicts issued under methodology v3.3 are stamped to SFDR v1 (Reg 2019/2088 as consolidated 09/01/2024) and remain valid as of date of issue.
